name: acen_local
description: Reference-parity: actr.local per-cluster transform on a 2-cluster asymmetric face selection of a CLEAN segments-2 cube (empty reset so prim.cube isn't appended onto the default cube). Each disjoint cluster transforms about its OWN center along its OWN local frame (fwd=normal). move locks the per-cluster axis; rotate the centre + axis. Also pins TZ on a segments=4 cube with three patches on three different faces (+Y/+X/-Z, 9 polys -> 3 disjoint clusters).
source: Frozen reference capture (manual viewport drag, actr.local).

input.argstring: prim.cube cenX:0 cenY:0 cenZ:0 sizeX:1 sizeY:1 sizeZ:1 segmentsX:2 segmentsY:2 segmentsZ:2 radius:0
prim.cube cenX:0 cenY:0 cenZ:0 sizeX:1 sizeY:1 sizeZ:1 segmentsX:2 segmentsY:2 segmentsZ:2 radius:0
prim.cube cenX:0 cenY:0 cenZ:0 sizeX:1 sizeY:1 sizeZ:1 segmentsX:3 segmentsY:3 segmentsZ:3 radius:0
prim.cube cenX:0 cenY:0 cenZ:0 sizeX:1 sizeY:1 sizeZ:1 segmentsX:4 segmentsY:4 segmentsZ:4 radius:0
prim.cube cenX:0 cenY:0 cenZ:0 sizeX:1 sizeY:1 sizeZ:1 segmentsX:4 segmentsY:4 segmentsZ:4 radius:0
